source_pr.title: util/testleak: make it work right
source_pr.body:
Fix a bug of testleak.

After this change, testleak found many `tidb.asyncGetTSWorker` leaks, 
but it's hard to fix them now because too many test cases are involved.

Many  sessions are not closed in test code, even those are fixed,
`sysSessionPool` still makes a big trouble.

Maybe with GetTSAsync API in https://github.com/pingcap/pd/pull/653, I can refactor
`asyncGetTSWorker` and get rid of the the problem.

@zimulala @coocood @shenli

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because background resources (stores/sessions/goroutines) were not consistently cleaned up before leak detection, making failures order- and timing-dependent. This PR stabilizes it by ensuring cleanup (e.g., defer store.Close()) and refining testleak to reduce false positives from goroutines still shutting down.
fix_pattern: Ensure proper cleanup (close stores/sessions) and make leak detection resilient to slow goroutine shutdown to avoid suite-level flakiness.

evidence: files: bootstrap_test.go, tidb_test.go, util/testleak/leaktest.go, Makefile, util/testleak/fake.go
